item.description:
FPL Raptor (Ross) @FPL__Raptor · 2min “Nico is fine” is the worst possible news on free hit
I’m tempted to still go with Cherki instead and hope Nico is rested against Burnley, but there’s no guarantee Cherki starts Burnley either… Cita Manchester City @ManCity · 14min Pep Ruben [Dias] is not ready. Nico [O'Reilly] is fine. 1 9 1 mil
